enemy.name: The Group Project
enemy.special: Phase 2: last member standing, hits for 11 (Desperate strike). Losing group buff.

hand.name: Thorns
hand.description: Gain 6 block and reflect 3 damage when hit.

relics.name: Herbal Pouch
relics.description: Apply 1 Poison to all enemies each turn start. Heal 3 HP after combat.

notes: Group Project at 7 HP in phase 2 (last member). Already has 2 poison on it. Player has 3 poison stacks on them, chain 3 active. Enemy is ABOUT to add 4 more poison to player. Two Reckless cards could kill in 1 turn (7 HP, 2×18 charged = well more than needed). But cleanse is needed or player takes 7 poison damage over time. Is 1 Reckless + Cleanse better? Or just burst with both Reckless (6 HP self-damage, 7 HP total with existing poison) and win immediately? Potentially a 'just kill it' obvious play.
